heading: Eligible Indian veteran services
label: 1647 Eligible Indian veteran services

children.label: A
children.text: collaborations between the Secretary and the Secretary of Veterans Affairs regarding the treatment of Indian veterans at facilities of the Service should be encouraged to the maximum extent practicable; and

children.label: B
children.text: increased enrollment for services of the Department of Veterans Affairs by veterans who are members of Indian tribes should be encouraged to the maximum extent practicable.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: 2 Purpose
children.text: The purpose of this section is to reaffirm the goals stated in the document entitled “Memorandum of Understanding Between the VA/Veterans Health Administration And HHS/Indian Health Service” and dated (relating to cooperation and resource sharing between the Veterans Health Administration and Service).February 25, 2003

children.label: A
children.text: authorized under the laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs; and

children.label: B
children.text: administered at a facility of the Service (including a facility operated by an Indian tribe or tribal organization through a contract or compact with the Service under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.)) pursuant to a local memorandum of understanding.25 U.S.C. 4501See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Local memorandum of understanding
children.label: 2 Local memorandum of understanding
children.text: The term “local memorandum of understanding” means a memorandum of understanding between the Secretary (or a designee, including the director of any area office of the Service) and the Secretary of Veterans Affairs (or a designee) to implement the document entitled “Memorandum of Understanding Between the VA/Veterans Health Administration And HHS/Indian Health Service” and dated (relating to cooperation and resource sharing between the Veterans Health Administration and Indian Health Service).February 25, 2003

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary shall provide for veteran-related expenses incurred by eligible Indian veterans as described in subsection (b)(1)(B).

children.heading: Method of payment
children.label: 2 Method of payment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish such guidelines as the Secretary determines to be appropriate regarding the method of payments to the Secretary of Veterans Affairs under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Tribal approval of memoranda
children.label: d Tribal approval of memoranda
children.text: In negotiating a local memorandum of understanding with the Secretary of Veterans Affairs regarding the provision of services to eligible Indian veterans, the Secretary shall consult with each Indian tribe that would be affected by the local memorandum of understanding.

children.heading: Treatment
children.label: 1 Treatment
children.text: Expenses incurred by the Secretary in carrying out subsection (c)(1) shall not be considered to be Contract Health Service expenses.

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: Of funds made available to the Secretary in appropriations Acts for the Service (excluding funds made available for facilities, Contract Health Services, or contract support costs), the Secretary shall use such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
